# Architecture Decision Record (ADR) Template

## Title

Short decision title.

## Status

Proposed | Accepted | Superseded

## Date

YYYY-MM-DD

## Context

What problem requires this decision now.

## Decision

What is chosen, written in explicit terms.

## Consequences

Benefits, tradeoffs, and known costs.

## Alternatives Considered

- option
- option

## Impacted Areas

- apps/packages
- contracts
- operations or QA
